playbook.name: Create New Project Pre-Fill
playbook.description: Extracts key Project fields from uploaded legal documents to pre-fill the Create New Project wizard. Returns a flat JSON with display names for projectName, projectDescription, projectTypeName, practiceAreaName, assignedAttorneyName, assignedParalegalName, assignedOutsideCounselName, and confidence score. Frontend resolves display names to Dataverse lookup GUIDs via fuzzy matching.

projectName.description: A concise descriptive name for the project. Should capture the key purpose or engagement type.

projectDescription.description: Brief narrative describing the project scope, key parties, subject matter, and objectives.

projectTypeName.description: The type of project (e.g., Litigation, Corporate Transaction, Regulatory Compliance). Must match a value in the project type lookup table. Use proper case, full official name.
projectTypeName.constraint: Must match a value in sprk_mattertype_ref

practiceAreaName.description: The practice area (e.g., Employment Law, Corporate Law, Intellectual Property). Must match a value in the practice area lookup table.
practiceAreaName.constraint: Must match a value in sprk_practicearea_ref

assignedAttorneyName.description: Full name of the primary attorney as it would appear in the contact directory (e.g., 'Jane Smith', not 'J. Smith').

assignedParalegalName.description: Full name of the assigned paralegal as it would appear in the contact directory.

assignedOutsideCounselName.description: Full legal name of the outside counsel organization (e.g., 'Wilson & Partners LLP', not 'Wilson').

confidence.description: Overall extraction confidence from 0.0 to 1.0. Set lower if document content is ambiguous or fields are inferred rather than explicitly stated.

extractionRules: Return display names only — never return Dataverse GUIDs or record IDs
Omit fields rather than guess — if a field cannot be extracted with reasonable confidence, leave it out of the JSON entirely
Use exact display names when possible — the frontend fuzzy-matches against Dataverse lookup tables
For assignedAttorneyName and assignedParalegalName, use full names as they would appear in a contact directory
For assignedOutsideCounselName, use the full legal entity name including suffixes (LLP, LLC, etc.)
The confidence score should reflect how many fields were extractable and how certain the extractions are
